market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
articles.description: Spotify is partnering with  Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.

articles.title: Law enforcement shuts down VPN service used by two dozen ransomware gangs
articles.description: First VPN promised hackers complete anonymity for their cyberattacks. But Europol said it was able to notify the service’s users that they have now been identified.

articles.title: Six search engines worth trying now that Google isn’t really Google anymore
articles.description: Google is about to look really different, and if you're not a fan of the AI overview feature, then you're not going to like what's coming.

articles.title: Satoshi’s 1.1M bitcoin and millions more can be saved from quantum attack, says expert
articles.description: Researchers at the privacy-centric blockchain startup say their multi-layer quantum defense will feature a soft fork to freeze and protect dormant BTC.

articles.title: Petition to scrap South Korea's crypto tax reaches 50K threshold
articles.description: Critics say the new 22% crypto tax, set to take effect in 2027, unfairly favors other asset classes with a much lower tax burden.

articles.title: CFTC signs MOU with National Hockey League over prediction markets
articles.description: The financial regulator signed a similar agreement with Major League Baseball in March and continues to file lawsuits against state-level authorities going after prediction market platforms over sports betting.

articles.title: Convective Capital raises an $85 million fund to build disaster resilience
articles.description: After launching to invest in fire tech, Convective is broadening its mandate to disaster resilience.

articles.title: Trump delays AI security executive order: ‘I don’t want to get in the way of that leading’
articles.description: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

articles.title: Blockchain.com confidentially submits IPO filing with SEC
articles.description: The crypto services company began the US IPO process as companies across the digital asset sector weigh public market debuts.

articles.title: Mark Cuban says he sold most of his Bitcoin after failed hedge narrative 'disappointed' the billionaire
articles.description: The billionaire investor said he sold most of his bitcoin after concluding the cryptocurrency failed to act as a hedge during recent geopolitical turmoil and dollar weakness.

articles.title: Ethereum’s identity crisis is deepening after high-profile 'brain drain' frustrates the community
articles.description: What began earlier this week as shock over more exits of core figures has now evolved into something more existential, according to some community members.

articles.title: Bitcoin accumulation trends weaken as realized losses jump to $600M
articles.description: Bitcoin whales and investors shift to distribution as realized losses surge past $600 million, as BTC price declines toward $76,000.

articles.title: This young startup is taking on a fragrance industry that hasn’t changed in almost half a century
articles.description: Fragrance tech company Patina announced Thursday a $2 million raise from investors, including Betaworks and True Ventures.

articles.title: Bitcoin due '5%+' move as analysis stays bullish on BTC price outlook
articles.description: Bitcoin should shift 5% or more "soon" with $77,000 staying the focus amid mixed messages over the latest US-Iran peace deal plans.

articles.title: Crypto prediction markets are turning into dangerous national security risks, and Congress wants to ban them
articles.description: Bubblemaps investigators led by Nicolas Vaiman, discovered 80 bets on Polymarket with a 98% win rate that he said is statistically impossible to achieve.

articles.title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
articles.description: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets.

articles.title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
articles.description: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

articles.title: Spotify will reserve tickets for top fans of an artists in a bid to drum up engagement
articles.description: Spotify said that it will monitor activity like streams and shares to determine who is a top fan

articles.title: U.S. CFTC secures deal with National Hockey League on prediction market safeguards
articles.description: A new arrangement has been set between the derivatives regulator and professional hockey, following on the heels of a similar baseball agreement.

articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto Products
articles.description: Advisors need to assess ETP custody, sponsor profiles, and fees. Read expert advice on bitcoin-backed loans, including margin call risks and when to sell vs. borrow.
